name: CEL_PROGRAMS_VL
query: SELECT B.PROGRAM_ID, T.PROGRAM_NAME, T.REPORTING_NAME, B.POINTS_RANGE_CODE, B.POINTS_MINIMUM, B.POINTS_MAXIMUM, B.POINTS_INCREMENT, B.TYPE_CODE, B.SUBTYPE_CODE, B.AWARD_TYPE_CODE, B.VISIBILITY_CODE, B.TIME_UNIT_CODE, B.TIME_UNIT_COUNT, B.TRIGGER_TIME_UNIT_COUNT, B.SENIORITY_DATE_CODE, B.OWNERS_ENABLED_FLAG, B.START_DATE, B.END_DATE, B.USE_POINTS_FLAG, B.SENDER_LIMIT_MAXIMUM, B.RECEIVER_LIST_CODE, B.RECOGNITION_DATE, B.NOMINATION_END_DATE, B.SELECTION_END_DATE, B.WINNERS_TOTAL, B.WINNERS_ENABLED_FLAG, B.ALLOW_VISIBILITY_CHANGE_FLAG, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, T.DESCRIPTION, T.AWARD_DESCRIPTION, B.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, B.QSTNR_VERSION_NUM FROM CEL_PROGRAMS_B B, CEL_PROGRAMS_TL T WHERE B.PROGRAM_ID = T.PROGRAM_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
